title: dimorphorchis lowii var. rohaniana
intro: Dimorphorchis lowii var. rohaniana is a rare and unique orchid species native to the Western Ghats region of India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dimorphorchis lowii var. rohaniana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
